The Spot: Regular Classes

The Spot runs weekly pilates classes for people of all genders, body types, and abilities.

Classes focus on foundational movements, but don't be fooled! They'll put your core, back, shoulders, and pelvis to the test.

Each class is $15 plus tax. You don't need a membership to drop-in.

Inquire via email about the 10 Class Pass for $100 plus tax.

Book Your Drop-In
